notes: Links on hit and frame traps on block. Less rewarding from 5MP but easier to confirm than the TC.
Simple and straight-forward starter for a lot of what Rashid wants to do. Extends very easily with OD Arabian Cyclone midscreen and partial charge Whirlwind Shot in the corner.
Relatively standard link, usually used from a jump-in combo.
Very consistent thanks to 2MK's great reach.
Rashid needs extra hitstun in order to combo into HK Eagle Spike from 5HP.
Basic introduction to how Rashid's linking options work. Anytime he can land 5MK, linking into 5MP is the best choice.
Choice between standing mixup (LP) or knockdown (MP).
Basic combo from a Drive Impact.
More difficult DI punish for better corner carry.
Juggle extension from air hit 5HP on blocked DI.
Rashid's highest damage DRC extension, usually limited to DP punishes.
Intermediate juggle route using 236HK and 214MP followups.
Sideswap extension using OD Arabian Cyclone.
